# Catalog — the shelf's MicroSoftware instances

<!-- GENERATED by tools/catalog.py from the *.toml files — do not edit; run `make catalog`. -->

One row per `catalog/*.toml`. Types live in [`docs/glossary.md`](../docs/glossary.md); these are instances. **Consumers are derived** from active [`use-cases/`](../use-cases/README.md) — a piece with none is *orphaned* (Article VIII). Founding set — bootstrapped, not promoted (Article VII governs new entries).

| Software | Kind | Tier | Release | Status | Implementation | Consumers | Capability |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| anyembed | any-lib | T1 | anyembed-v0.1.0 | active | hybrid-adapter | a2kay | Stop caring which embedding backend is underneath. |
| anyllm | any-lib | T1 | anyllm-v0.2.0 | active | hybrid-adapter | a2kay, a2web | Stop caring which LLM provider is underneath. |
| atomic-io | primitive | T0 | atomic-io-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2kay | Stop caring how to write a text file crash-safely — tempfile + fsync + os.replace, so a crash or a concurrent reader never observes a partial write. |
| browser-cookies | primitive | T1 | browser-cookies-v0.1.0 | candidate | hybrid-adapter | a2web | Stop caring how each browser stores its cookies — read the local machine's Chrome/Chromium/Brave/Edge/Firefox/Safari/etc cookie store into a uniform CookieRow, cross-platform. |
| content-extract | composite | T2 | content-extract-v0.1.1 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring how a web page becomes structured content — main-body markdown (via convert-md's convert_html), plus title / byline / date metadata and role-classified headings + links, in one ExtractedContent. |
| convert-md | composite | T2 | convert-md-v0.3.0 | active | hybrid-adapter | a2kay | Stop caring which engine converts which document format to markdown — from a file path OR an in-memory HTML string; heavy document engines behind an extra. |
| duckdb-sidecar | primitive | T0 | duckdb-sidecar-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2kay | Stop caring how to open a DuckDB sidecar connection — normalize the target, create the parent directory for a file target, support the :memory: passthrough, connect. |
| git-porcelain | any-lib | T1 | git-porcelain-v0.1.0 | active | ours | a2kay | Stop caring about git subprocess plumbing and credential fidelity. |
| html-fragment | primitive | T1 | html-fragment-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring how a server-supplied HTML fragment becomes text — convert a comment body / cooked / rendered-html blob into link-preserving markdown or plain text, entity-decoded. |
| http-cache | primitive | T1 | http-cache-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring about HTTP conditional-GET cache mechanics — content-hash dedup, gzip body column, TTL expiry, ETag/Last-Modified headers, and a (url, variant) key for per-profile caching. |
| http-fetch | primitive | T1 | http-fetch-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring about curl_cffi session plumbing — one GET with browser TLS impersonation, conditional GET, and closed-verdict error mapping. |
| json-in-html | primitive | T1 | json-in-html-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring how a page smuggles its structured data — pull LD-JSON, microdata, OpenGraph, window.__X__ var assignments, and raw JSON bodies out of HTML, ranked by answer-bearing strength. |
| managed-region | primitive | T0 | managed-region-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2kay | Stop caring how to keep a machine-owned block idempotent inside a human-edited document — replace content between a marker pair, prose outside untouched, marker-agnostic. |
| record-mine | primitive | T1 | record-mine-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring that a listing / index / threaded-discussion page is N repeated records, not one article — locate the dominant repeated-record region a boilerplate-stripper discards, and render it to depth-aware, link-preserving markdown. |
| settings-base | primitive | T1 | settings-base-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring about the env/YAML plumbing under a pydantic-settings config — ${VAR} expansion, a secret-stripping YAML source (secrets stay env-only), and file-existence-gated config-path resolution. |
| sqlite-resource | primitive | T0 | sqlite-resource-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring about aiosqlite open/close plumbing — a lazily-opened connection with a double-checked lock, caller-supplied pragmas + schema hook, idempotent close, and the async-CM protocol. |
| timefmt | primitive | T0 | timefmt-v0.1.0 | candidate | ours | a2web | Stop caring how to render a duration — one adaptive formatter whose units match magnitude (ms → 1-decimal s → integer s → m:ss), no wasted precision. |
